calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination That Wife Lacks Capacity To Join In Or Consent To Proprosed Transaction And Authorization To Execute Qualified Disclaimer On Wife'S Behalf
Off Calendar Jul-05-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Park for and with Francis Chow. Kerry Sykes for and with Gil Chow. Jenny Chow and other Family members (Children) were also present.

Ms. Sykes explained that when the Family first pruchased the 279 8th Avenue property, that Paul (Son) and Tina each put down 30% and that Francis and Jenny put down 40%. In addition, Ms. Sykes stated that when they took out a loan on the property for remodeling, that Franics was retired and because Katherine was working the argument could be made that Francis and Jenny gave Katherine their interest because she qualified for the loan/refinance, that all of the Family members are in support of this, that the plan is that Francis disclaim on behalf of Jenny in Katherine's Estate and then Francis intends to disclaim the community property interest. Ms. Sykes also expressed concern about the July 5th deadline to disclaim. The matter was taken under submission subject to receipt of the declarations from Francis and Gil setting forth the community property interest.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Determination That Wife Lacks Capacity To Join In Or Consent To Proprosed Transaction And Authorization To Execute Qualified Disclaimer On Wife'S Behalf
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Determination That Wife Lacks Capacity To Join In Or Consent To Proposed Transaction And Authorization To Execute A Durable Power Of Atto
Off Calendar May-16-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Park for Francis Chow.

Mr. Park stated that he was withdrawing his request for Advanced Health Care Directive and presented oral argument to support his position. The Court denied the petition and will revise the proposed order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos.

PETITION Petition For Determination That Wife Lacks Capacity To Join In Or Consent To Proposed Transaction And Authorization To Execute A Durable Power Of Atto
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Continued To May-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
